titleStmt.title: SII 24.513: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 513. (A.R. No. 97 of 1936-37.) EAST CHITTIRAI STREET, SLAB SET UP AT THE CORNER.

summary.p: Records sale of house-sites by two Brāhmaṇas of the temple to Achutappa-Nāyaka, son of Sevvappa-Nāyakka for 110 poṉ realised as aṅgaḍip-pārvai for establishing a Rāmānujakūṭam. The details of date viz. Śaka 1516, Jaya, Mēsha, śu. 3, Saturday, Rōhiṇī correspond regularly to 1594, A.D. April 13, Saturday, 55; ·66.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The Vaishnava teṉkalai mark is seen, flanked on either side by the sacred disc and conch.
div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśva
ran śrīvirapradāpa śrī viraveṅkaṭapati deva
mahā Irāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā
niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 6 Itaṉ meṟ
cellāniṉṟa jayasamvatsarattu me
ṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum
maṉtavāramum peṟṟa rohiṇi na
kṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍiya
(ṅ) kulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti
vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkam tiruppati cevva
ppa nāyakkar Avarkaḷ kumārar Accuta
ppa nāyakkar Avarkaḷukku Ittiruppati
Āriyapaṭṭarkaḷil pañcaṭaṭṭar tirumalai
yapparum nārāyaṇarumom maṉaivilai śā
sanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Iṟṟai nāḷ taṅ
kaḷ kayiṅkiriyamāka rāmānuja kūṭam I
ṭukiṟatukku viṟṟa maṉaikku Ellai Āvaṇi
māṭamāḷikai cūḻ tiruvitiyil kiḻaiyum
māṭat tiruvitiyil nārācattukku vaṭakku
veḷaiyaṉ kuṭiyiruppu maṉaikku teṟku I
ṉṉāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭa teṉmaṭal Aṭi
100 kku vāl Oḻuṅku Uḷpaṭavum vilaiyā
ka niścayitta poṉ 100 10 Intap poṉ nūṟṟu
Orupatum, Aṅkaṭip pārvaiyāka paṟṟik
koṇṭapaṭiyiṉāle Inta maṉaikku Itu
ve vilaiyāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu
maṉai vilai śāsanam paṇṇik kuṭuttom
Accutappanāyakkar Avarkaḷukku pañci
paṭṭar tirumalaiyapparum nārāyaṇarumom .
Ippaṭikku Inta maṉai vilai śāsanam Eḻutina
maikku koyil kaṇakku śrī raṅkanārā
yaṇap priyan Eḻuttu § śākṣi Uttamana
mpi sākṣi śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan
sākṣi nampiyaār virarākuva paṭṭar §
nitinikṣepa calapāṣāṇam Uḷ
paṭavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.513 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
